datasets.name: enqvist_growth_temps
datasets.description: Optimal growth temperatures for ~21,500 prokaryotes and eukaryotes, with NCBI taxonomy (domain through genus).
datasets.citation: Engqvist, M. K. M. (2018). Growth temperatures for ~21,500 microorganisms. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.1175609
